---
name: ai-search-visibility
description: Use when creating pages and fact blocks for AI search, answer engines, comparison prompts, and self-directed B2B buyers.
---
# AI Search Visibility

## Process

1. Identify buyer questions and comparison prompts.
2. Create fact-dense answer blocks.
3. Create comparison and alternative pages.
4. Add proof, limitations, pricing, integration, and security facts.
5. Update product fact memory.

## Output

```markdown
# AI Search Visibility Plan

## Query clusters
## Fact blocks
## Comparison pages
## FAQ pages
## Proof assets
## Memory updates
```
